mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.subject, s.department, s.professor, COUNT(st.id) AS student_count FROM subjects s LEFT JOIN students st ON st.department = s.department WHERE s.id = #{id} GROUP BY s.id, s.subject, s.department, s.professor

SELECT s.id, s.subject, s.department, s.professor, COUNT(st.id) AS student_count FROM subjects s LEFT JOIN students st ON st.department = s.department GROUP BY s.id, s.subject, s.department, s.professor ORDER BY s.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subjects (subject, department, professor) VALUES (#{subject}, #{department}, #{professor})
mapper.update: UPDATE subjects SET subject=#{subject}, department=#{department}, professor=#{professor} WHERE id=#{id}
